name: Google Analytics
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"How do I measure Merchandising Cloud's impact using Google Analytics?"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Tracking Search Refinements"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Log in to to your Google Analytics account, and then view your search refinements. This is the amount of times a user searched again immediately after performing a search. (If the number of search refinements is high, it means shoppers are not getting relevant results.)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To track the impact Merchandising Cloud has had on this number, go to your Google Analytics and go to Behaviour > Site Search > Overview."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BV3ZE5DWMWKM/3.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BV3ZE5DWMWKM/3.png","name":"3.png","type":"image/png","size":43309,"width":240,"height":556,"displaySize":"medium","float":"none","mediaID":485,"dateInserted":"2025-09-18T17:38:32+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Chose the metric “Search Refinements” and change the period to cover both before and after your installation of Merchandising Cloud."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Look at the date you went live with Merchandising Cloud and check how much lower your Search Refinements became following the integration."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://files.readme.io/e89735d-Search_Refinements_2.png","embedData":{"url":"https://files.readme.io/e89735d-Search_Refinements_2.png","name":"","embedType":"image","float":"none","resizemode":"stretchy-fit","source":"external"}},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Tracking Conversion"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can estimate the change in conversion created by Merchandising Cloud by comparing sessions with site search to sessions without site search - before and after you went live with Findify solutions. "},{"text":"NB - This will only work if you have not yet gone live with Smart Collections.","italic":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Because your collections and your search have the same assortment; the same pricing; and the same influence from external sources, you can compare your change in search conversion to your change in collections conversion before and after going live with Merchandising Cloud."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In Google analytics go to Behaviour > Site Search > Usage."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://files.readme.io/6800dcd-Google_Analytics_3.png","embedData":{"url":"https://files.readme.io/6800dcd-Google_Analytics_3.png","name":"","embedType":"image","float":"none","resizemode":"stretchy-fit","source":"external"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In the time period (selection on the right side of the screen), chose a time after installing Merchandising Cloud and a period to compare to before."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://files.readme.io/e40c665-Google_Analytics_4.png","embedData":{"url":"https://files.readme.io/e40c665-Google_Analytics_4.png","name":"","embedType":"image","float":"none","resizemode":"stretchy-fit","source":"external"}},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"📘 Top Tip"}]},{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"In your time period analysis, avoid the inclusion of major events such as Black Friday, Cyber Monday, and holiday sales as these events do not represent day-to-day business and can skew your analysis."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Compare the conversion for sessions with and without site search, before and after going live with Merchandising Cloud."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If the conversion with site search increased by +12% while your collections (without site search) increase by +2%, you can estimate the effect of Merchandising Cloud to be 12%-2% = a 10% increase in conversion."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://files.readme.io/fed9357-Google_Analytics_5.png","embedData":{"url":"https://files.readme.io/fed9357-Google_Analytics_5.png","name":"","embedType":"image","float":"none","resizemode":"stretchy-fit","source":"external"}},{"type":"h1","children":[{"text":"How do I track search events with Google Analytics?"}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"📘 Default tracking"}]},{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"By default, search events are automatically tracked by Google Analytics if you have Site Search Tracking enabled in your Google Analytics setup."}]},{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"However, in certain cases, Merchandising Cloud query parameters can conflict with your site query parameters which can cause issues. To overcome this issue, we're prefixing our parameters with a common prefix, e.g. "},{"text":"findify","code":true},{"text":", so instead of "},{"text":"q","code":true},{"text":" to identify the query parameter, "},{"text":"findify_q","code":true},{"text":" is used, which is not tracked by Google Analytics by default."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To set up the new query, and make sure all Merchandising Cloud searches are correctly tracked in Google Analytics, please follow these steps:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Step 1 - Identify the query parameter\nStep 2 - Add the query parameter to Google Analytics"}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Step 1: Identify the query parameter"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Perform a search in your store and identify the query parameter in the URL."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Most likely it will be "},{"text":"findify_q","code":true},{"text":" or "},{"text":"search_q","code":true}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/7JC96N5PGWUX/d603cef-findify-query-parameter.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/7JC96N5PGWUX/d603cef-findify-query-parameter.png","name":"d603cef-findify-query-parameter.png","type":"image/png","size":27586,"width":1310,"height":70,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":493,"dateInserted":"2025-09-18T18:00:28+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Step 2: Add the query parameter to Google Analytics"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Go to Google Analytics -> "},{"text":"Admin","code":true},{"text":" page -> 'View Settings`"}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/KZZMF195IMNG/1f59c49-view-settings.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/KZZMF195IMNG/1f59c49-view-settings.png","name":"1f59c49-view-settings.png","type":"image/png","size":288655,"width":3228,"height":1774,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":494,"dateInserted":"2025-09-18T18:00:56+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Scroll down the page to the "},{"text":"Site Search Settings","code":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Enabled the "},{"text":"Site search Tracking","code":true},{"text":" if it's not enabled"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Insert a comma and paste the query parameter from step 1"}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/L6P29MMB54AM/06d9cfb-site-search-settins.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/L6P29MMB54AM/06d9cfb-site-search-settins.png","name":"06d9cfb-site-search-settins.png","type":"image/png","size":72767,"width":1186,"height":664,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":495,"dateInserted":"2025-09-18T18:01:15+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
